Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for user-imported neural network topology
Correction: The system shall accept user-imported neural network topologies in ONNX format only.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in CSV format.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of error and warning messages
Correction: The system shall display error and warning messages for invalid selections, missing files, and unsupported formats.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum resolution of 128x128 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the compatibility requirements for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall only accept neural network topologies that are compatible with the specified hardware components.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall store inference results and diagnostic data in JSON format.

Label: /TC-INF-10/
Issue: Does not specify the expected output format for inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with confidence scores and diagnostic data in tabular format.

Label: /TC-ERR-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of invalid neural networks
Correction: The system shall display an error message for unsupported neural network formats, corrupted files, and incompatible topologies.

Label: /TC-ERR-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of invalid images
Correction: The system shall display an error message for unsupported image formats, corrupted files, and images with dimensions smaller than the minimum supported size.
